mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) above 100k jobs signals robust labor market demand, boosting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k monthly gains.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in housing starts (HOUST) indicates weakening consumer demand, prompting central banks to adopt accommodative policies that drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST declines by 5%+ over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and declining inflation (CPIAUCSL) signals efficient supply chains and stable pricing, creating a favorable environment for positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of instances where INDPRO rises and CPIAUCSL falls simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: High unemployment (UNRATE > 5%) triggers expectations of monetary easing, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days during post-recession recovery phases.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5% during recovery periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) reflects strong manufacturing activity, increasing corporate profits and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO rises by 1%+ monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation below 2% (CPIAUCSL) signals stable price expectations, reducing risk premiums and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL remains below 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real sales (RSAFS) indicate strong consumer spending, boosting corporate revenues and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where RSAFS rises by 1%+ monthly.
